text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 Israeli Army Radio: The village of Ghandouriya, where the incident occurred in which a UNIFIL soldier was killed by Hezbollah gunfire, lies south of the Litani River and is very close to the IDF's "Yellow Line"—just 2.5 kilometres from the village…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇫🇷 🇺🇳 Lebanese President Joseph Aoun received a phone call from French President Emmanuel Macron to discuss the ceasefire and preparations for negotiations based on Aoun’s initiative. Aoun also expressed condolences over the death of a French UNIFIL soldier who was killed by "armed gunmen" in Ghandouriya, and condemned the targeting of French forces serving peace and stability. He stressed that Lebanon rejects any attack on UNIFIL, has ordered an immediate investigation, and will not tolerate those involved, vowing to bring them to justice. @wfwitness

To counter the blue in south Lebanon we will rely on Sepah's will and honor to not abandon us This is the war that can finally offset the dire ramifications of the 7-October war and bring back some calm Netanyahu will be dog-leach dragged by Trump if that's what is needed for a deal that's good for the U.S. Sell Trump what he wants to hear and he will drool because of his blind greed.

They have done an absolutely amazing job of innovating, and I am publicly on record saying we are learning a lot from them and we are changing to a lot of the lessons that they have taught us.

Btw the IDF is lying when it comes to claim they control 55 towns. Count is closer to 32 most of which are tiny abandoned towns or ones demolished and abandoned in the old war (2024 like Hula, Maroun al-Ras, Mays al-Jabal) Major towns lost in this war that added to the existing buffer zone are Khiyam, Taybeh and Bint Jbeil. The operations in Bint Jbeil and Khiyam weren't complete but the IDF spread in them after. Expect new incursions to eat up more land. The area is big but mostly empty lands and mountains. Includes all Christian towns that have new Israeli buddies (old buddies) The IDF was informed that they are not allowed to attack anything outside of this blue area, not even Beqaa or Beirut or even the other areas of south Litani river. If this holds, it'll be a major success considering before March-2026 they had free reign to attack anywhere and did attack everywhere on weekly basis including Beqaa and both south/north Litani area Admin thinks the war didn't end and might resume
Hezbullah asks people NOT to stay and settle back home, especially in the south Litani area

One peacekeeper was killed and three others wounded, two seriously. Initial assessment indicates…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Army Radio: The village of Ghandouriya, where the incident occurred in which a UNIFIL soldier was killed by Hezbollah gunfire, lies south of the Litani River and is very close to the IDF's "Yellow Line"—just 2.5 kilometres from the village of Qantara, where Israeli forces are operating. The report underscores that Hezbollah continues to operate south of the Litani, in close proximity to IDF troops. @wfwitness

Ghandourieh is literally at the so-called Israeli occupation line and near Qantara The French should lick their wounds and fuck off. They have bases in the Israeli occupied area they should look after.

text: 🇺🇸 🇪🇸 Donald Trump took to Truth Social to mock Spain's economy — while apparently unaware that Spain has been outgrowing the United States for two consecutive years. Spain's economy grew 2.8% in 2025, outpacing the U.S. at 2.1% for the full year—with Q4 annualized growth at 1.4% (0.7% quarter-over-quarter). In 2024, Spain's economy grew 3.2% to the U.S.'s 2.8%. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇪🇸 唐纳德·特朗普在“真实社交”（Truth Social）上嘲讽西班牙的经济——显然他并不知道西班牙的经济增长率已经连续两年超过美国。2025年西班牙经济增长了2.8%，全年增速超过了美国的2.1%——第四季度年化增长率为1.4%（环比增长0.7%）。2024年，西班牙经济增长了3.2%，而美国为2.8%。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 The commander of Iran’s Air Defence Force Alireza Elhami said that Iranian air defences shot down an advanced MQ‑4C surveillance drone west of the Strait of Hormuz. He claimed that over 170 of the enemy’s most advanced drones and fighter jets, including…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Iranian Air Defense Force commander Alireza Elhami stated that Iranian fighter jets escorted the Pakistani army chief’s aircraft from the border to Tehran. Pakistani jets accompanied their commander to the zero point of the border before handing over to Iranian jets. The operation demonstrated that Iran’s airspace security is fully under the control of its armed forces. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 伊朗防空部队指挥官阿里雷扎·埃尔哈米（Alireza Elhami）表示，伊朗防空部队在霍尔木兹海峡以西击落了一架先进的MQ-4C侦察无人机。他声称，敌方超过170架最先进的无人机和战斗机已被摧毁，其中包括……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 伊朗防空部队指挥官阿里雷扎·埃尔哈米表示，伊朗战斗机护送了巴基斯坦陆军参谋长的飞机从边境前往德黑兰。巴基斯坦战机陪同其指挥官到达边境零点，随后移交给伊朗战机。此次行动表明，伊朗的领空安全完全处于其武装部队的控制之下。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 The commander of Iran’s Air Defence Force Alireza Elhami said that Iranian air defences shot down an advanced MQ‑4C surveillance drone west of the Strait of Hormuz. He claimed that over 170 of the enemy’s most advanced drones and fighter jets, including F‑15s, have been destroyed. He added that Iran’s air defence remained active even during long‑range missile attacks, proving that no altitude is unreachable. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗防空部队指挥官阿里雷扎·埃尔哈米表示，伊朗防空部队在霍尔木兹海峡以西击落了一架先进的MQ-4C侦察无人机。他声称，敌方超过170架最先进的无人机和战斗机（包括F-15）已被摧毁。他补充说，伊朗的防空系统即使在远程导弹袭击期间也保持活跃，证明没有无法企及的高度。@wfwitness

text: Russian Foreign Minister Lavrov: When it was necessary to recognize Kosovo’s independence, the principle of self-determination was used—even though there was no referendum and no observers. But in the case of Crimea, a few years later, when Crimea did not want to accept the government that came to power, then suddenly territorial integrity became the main principle. Everything is adjusted depending on the situation.
text_zh: 俄罗斯外交部长拉夫罗夫：当需要承认科索沃独立时，使用的是民族自决原则——尽管当时没有举行公投，也没有观察员。但在几年后的克里米亚问题上，当克里米亚不想接受上台的政府时，领土完整突然成了主要原则。一切都根据情况进行调整。

Expect a massive wave of arrests by the Lebanese army soon against locals and Hezbullah fighters in the town

text: Russian Foreign Minister Lavrov: The so-called "rules-based order" has never existed—except as this slogan itself.
text_zh: 俄罗斯外交部长拉夫罗夫：所谓的“基于规则的秩序”从来就不存在——除了作为这个口号本身。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇺🇳 The Lebanese Army command condemned an incident in the Al‑Ghandouriya area of Bint Jbeil, where an exchange of fire between armed individuals and a UNIFIL patrol resulted in casualties among the patrol members. text: WarTranslated UKMTO says two IRGC boats opened fire on a tanker about 20 nautical miles northeast of Oman without a VHF warning and the ship and crew are safe. Reuters reports Iran fired on at least two merchant vessels trying to transit the Strait of Hormuz. https://www.reuters.com/world/asia-pacific/trump-says-he-has-good-news-iran-no-clarity-peace-deal-2026-04-18/ https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045476038382080176/photo/1 Iran says it has closed the Strait of Hormuz again over a US blockade. The IRGC says the US did not fulfill its obligations. - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：英国海上贸易行动办公室（UKMTO）称，两艘伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）船只在阿曼东北约20海里处向一艘油轮开火，没有发出VHF警告，船只和船员安全。路透社报道称，伊朗向至少两艘试图通过霍尔木兹海峡的商船开火。https://www.reuters.com/world/asia-pacific/trump-says-he-has-good-news-iran-no-clarity-peace-deal-2026-04-18/ https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045476038382080176/photo/1 伊朗称因美国封锁再次关闭了霍尔木兹海峡。伊斯兰革命卫队称美国没有履行其义务。 - WarTranslated 推文

text: WarTranslated Pilots from the Birds of Magyar and Nemesis brigades destroyed a Russian TOS-1A Solntsepyok in occupied Zaporizhzhia region, Robert Magyar reports. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045470408627904870/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：罗伯特·马扎尔（Robert Magyar）报告称，来自“马扎尔之鸟”（Birds of Magyar）和“复仇女神”（Nemesis）旅的飞行员在被占领的扎波罗热地区摧毁了一辆俄罗斯TOS-1A“日炙”（Solntsepyok）喷火坦克。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045470408627904870/video/1 推文

text: 🇸🇪 🇺🇦 ☠️ The King of Sweden became the first monarch to visit Ukraine and the Ukroslaves/Ukrozombies dying in vain for their Western masters during the war . Yesterday, the 79-year-old King of Sweden, Carl XVI Gustaf, visited Lviv. He was accompanied on the trip by the head of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs, Maria Malmer Stenberg, the royal court reported. During the visit, the king met with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky, honored the memory of Ukrainians who died in the war, walked around the center of Lviv, visited the Superhumans center for prosthetics and rehabilitation of war victims, a school, and the St. Andrew's Church, which was at the epicenter of a Russian strike in March. "In Sweden, we wholeheartedly support the brave Ukrainians. You can count on our full support. I am deeply impressed by the courage you have shown, Mr. President. You are a great leader of Ukraine," the king said to Zelensky. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇸🇪 🇺🇦 ☠️ 瑞典国王成为第一位访问乌克兰的君主，看望那些在战争中为西方主子徒劳牺牲的乌克兰奴隶/乌克兰僵尸。据王室报道，昨天，79岁的瑞典国王卡尔十六世·古斯塔夫访问了利沃夫。外交大臣玛丽亚·马尔默·斯滕伯格（Maria Malmer Stenberg）陪同出访。访问期间，国王会见了乌克兰总统弗拉基米尔·泽连斯基，悼念了在战争中牺牲的乌克兰人，参观了利沃夫市中心，访问了为战争受害者提供假肢和康复服务的“超人”（Superhumans）中心、一所学校以及在3月份俄罗斯袭击中处于震中的圣安德烈教堂。国王对泽连斯基说：“在瑞典，我们全心全意支持勇敢的乌克兰人。你们可以指望我们的全力支持。总统先生，您展现出的勇气令我印象深刻。您是乌克兰伟大的领导人。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: Has anybody looked at how badly the country of Spain is doing. Their financial numbers, despite contributing almost nothing to NATO and their military defense, are absolutely horrendous. Sad to watch!!!
text_zh: 特朗普：有没有人看过西班牙这个国家的情况有多糟糕。尽管他们几乎没有为北约和他们的军事防御做出任何贡献，但他们的财务数据简直糟糕透顶。看着真让人难过！！！

text: Russian Foreign Minister Lavrov: In our character, there is such a quality as patience. But at some point, patience runs out.
text_zh: 俄罗斯外交部长拉夫罗夫：在我们的性格中，有一种品质叫耐心。但在某个时刻，耐心会耗尽。

text: 🇵🇱 🇷🇺 🇧🇾 Poland will not allow athletes from Russia and Belarus to participate in the European Diving Championships, despite the decision of the international federation . The championship will take place in Poland in 2027. "If the military situation does not change, we will not allow athletes from Russia and Belarus to participate," — quotes the head of the Polish swimming federation, Otelia Jendzejczak Polskie Radio . When Israel and USA mass kill innocent civilians "THAT IS DIFFERENT YOU DON'T UNDERSTAND"... 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇵🇱 🇷🇺 🇧🇾 尽管国际联合会做出了决定，波兰仍将不允许俄罗斯和白俄罗斯的运动员参加欧洲跳水锦标赛。该锦标赛将于2027年在波兰举行。“如果军事局势没有改变，我们将不允许俄罗斯和白俄罗斯的运动员参赛，”波兰游泳联合会主席奥特莉亚·延杰伊恰克（Otelia Jendzejczak）在接受波兰广播电台（Polskie Radio）采访时表示。当以色列和美国大规模杀害无辜平民时，“那是不一样的，你不懂”…… 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Brazilian President Lula: Brazil does not want war with the United States. I don’t want war with China, I don’t want war with Russia, I don’t want war with Uruguay.
text_zh: 巴西总统卢拉：巴西不想与美国开战。我不想与中国开战，我不想与俄罗斯开战，我不想与乌拉圭开战。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Iranian judicial authorities have seized the assets and bank accounts of dozens of individuals accused of collaborating with hostile foreign entities, including the "Zionist regime and the United States." The list includes actors Mahnaz Afshar, Niki Karimi and Sina Sarlak, former footballer Masoud Shojaei, and YouTuber Hamid Sepidnam (known as “Mister Taster”). Others include Mazdak Mirzaei, taekwondo athlete Kimia Alizadeh, and several journalists and social media influencers based abroad. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 伊朗司法当局已查封了数十名被指控与敌对外国实体（包括“犹太复国主义政权和美国”）勾结的人员的资产和银行账户。名单包括演员马赫纳兹·阿夫沙尔（Mahnaz Afshar）、尼基·卡里米（Niki Karimi）和西纳·萨拉赫（Sina Sarlak），前足球运动员马苏德·绍贾伊（Masoud Shojaei），以及YouTube博主哈米德·塞皮德纳姆（Hamid Sepidnam，被称为“美食家先生”）。其他人还包括马兹达克·米尔扎伊（Mazdak Mirzaei）、跆拳道运动员基米亚·阿里扎德（Kimia Alizadeh）以及几名常驻国外的记者和社交媒体影响者。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 Hezbollah political deputy Mahmoud Qamati thanked Iran for imposing the ceasefire through “international pressure” and criticised Lebanese President Joseph Aoun for thanking “the killer and criminal” Trump instead of Iran. He accused the Lebanese state of “running and rushing toward humiliation and the squandering of sovereignty step by step”. Qamati said there will be no return to the situation before 2 March, that the resistance is ready to confront any Israeli violation, and called on displaced residents not to settle back yet, warning of Israeli treachery. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 真主党政治副手马哈茂德·卡马蒂（Mahmoud Qamati）感谢伊朗通过“国际压力”实施停火，并批评黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩（Joseph Aoun）感谢“杀手和罪犯”特朗普而不是伊朗。他指责黎巴嫩国家“一步步走向屈辱和挥霍主权”。卡马蒂表示，局势不会回到3月2日之前，抵抗力量已准备好应对任何以色列的侵犯，并呼吁流离失所的居民暂时不要返回，警告以色列的背信弃义。 @wfwitness

text: Brazilian President Lula: Cuba has problems, but they are the problems of the Cuban people. It is not a problem for Lula, for Claudia, or for Trump—it is a problem for the Cuban people. Stop this damned blockade on Cuba and let the Cuban people live their lives.
text_zh: 巴西总统卢拉：古巴有问题，但那是古巴人民的问题。这不是卢拉的问题，不是克劳迪娅的问题，也不是特朗普的问题——这是古巴人民的问题。停止对古巴该死的封锁，让古巴人民过他们自己的生活。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇫🇷🇱🇧🇺🇳🇱🇧 French President Emmanuel Macron announced that French Sergeant Chief Florian Montorio of the 17th Parachute Engineer Regiment was killed this morning in southern Lebanon during an attack on UNIFIL. Three of his comrades were wounded and have…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 The Lebanese Army command condemned an incident in the Al‑Ghandouriya area of Bint Jbeil, where an exchange of fire between armed individuals and a UNIFIL patrol resulted in casualties among the patrol members. The army said it maintains close coordination with UNIFIL during this sensitive phase and has opened an investigation to determine the circumstances and arrest those involved. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇫🇷🇱🇧🇺🇳🇱🇧 法国总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙宣布，第17伞兵工兵团的法国中士弗洛里安·蒙托里奥（Florian Montorio）今天早上在黎巴嫩南部针对联合国驻黎巴嫩临时部队（联黎部队）的袭击中丧生。他的三名战友受伤，并已……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 黎巴嫩军队司令部谴责了在宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）的阿尔-甘杜里亚（Al‑Ghandouriya）地区发生的事件，武装人员与联黎部队巡逻队之间的交火导致巡逻队成员伤亡。军方表示，在此敏感阶段与联黎部队保持密切协调，并已展开调查以确定情况并逮捕相关人员。 @wfwitness

text: 🇱🇧 ⚔️ 🇫🇷 🇺🇳 ☠️ Domestic abuse victim cries that Hezbollah allegedly killed a French soldier... 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚔️ 🇫🇷 🇺🇳 ☠️ 家庭虐待受害者哭诉真主党涉嫌杀害了一名法国士兵…… 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Brazilian President Lula: Lebanon becomes the victim of every war Israel fights—the last shot always ends up in Lebanon.
text_zh: 巴西总统卢拉：黎巴嫩成为了以色列参与的每一场战争的受害者——最后一枪总是落在黎巴嫩。

text: Brazilian President Lula: What cannot happen is that the world spends $2.7 trillion on weapons while people go hungry. What cannot happen is that we talk about decarbonizing the planet while bombs are being dropped every single day.
text_zh: 巴西总统卢拉：不能发生的事情是，世界在武器上花费2.7万亿美元，而人们却在挨饿。不能发生的事情是，我们谈论地球脱碳，而炸弹却每天都在投下。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇶🇦 Qatari Director of Defence Intelligence Operations to the U.S in interview with Sky News: "Extremely dangerous situation in the Strait of Hormuz" 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇶🇦 卡塔尔国防情报行动主管在接受天空新闻采访时对美国表示：“霍尔木兹海峡局势极其危险” 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: French President Macron: Sergeant-Chef Florian Montorio of the 17th Parachute Engineer Regiment from Montauban fell this morning in southern Lebanon during an attack against UNIFIL. Three of his brothers-in-arms are wounded and have been evacuated. Everything suggests that responsibility for this attack lies with Hezbollah.
text_zh: 法国总统马克龙：来自蒙托邦的第17伞兵工兵团中士弗洛里安·蒙托里奥今天早上在黎巴嫩南部针对联黎部队的袭击中阵亡。他的三名战友受伤并已被撤离。一切迹象表明，这次袭击的责任在于真主党。

text: ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 🇱🇧 French President Emmanuel Macron announced that French Sergeant Chief Florian Montorio of the 17th Parachute Engineer Regiment was killed this morning in southern Lebanon during an attack on UNIFIL. Three of his comrades were wounded and have been evacuated. “Everything suggests that responsibility for this attack lies with Hezbollah,” President Macron said. France demands that Lebanese authorities immediately arrest the perpetrators and take their responsibilities alongside UNIFIL. French Minister of the Armed Forces Catherine Vautrin added that Montorio, an experienced non‑commissioned officer, was on a mission to open a route to a UNIFIL post that had been isolated for several days. He was ambushed by an armed group at very close range and hit by small‑arms fire. He died despite efforts by his comrades. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 🇱🇧 法国总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙宣布，第17伞兵工兵团的法国中士弗洛里安·蒙托里奥今天早上在黎巴嫩南部针对联黎部队的袭击中丧生。他的三名战友受伤并已被撤离。马克龙总统说：“一切迹象表明，这次袭击的责任在于真主党。”法国要求黎巴嫩当局立即逮捕肇事者，并与联黎部队一起承担责任。法国武装部队部长凯瑟琳·沃特兰（Catherine Vautrin）补充说，蒙托里奥是一位经验丰富的士官，当时正在执行任务，为联黎部队一个已被孤立数日的哨所开辟路线。他在极近距离遭到武装团体的伏击，并被轻武器击中。尽管他的战友们进行了抢救，他还是不幸身亡。 @wfwitness

text: CENTCOM: Since commencement of the blockade, 23 ships have complied with direction from U.S. forces to turn around.
text_zh: 中央司令部：自封锁开始以来，已有23艘船只听从美军指示掉头离开。

text: 🔄 Forwarded from ResistanceTrench mirror: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei Issues Strong Message on Iran Army Day Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei, Supreme Leader of Iran, issued a message marking the anniversary of the Islamic Republic of Iran’s Army, emphasizing military strength, national unity, and continued resistance against enemies. He stated that the 1979 Islamic Revolution transformed the army from a force tied to the Pahlavi regime into a people-based institution, describing it as “a child of the nation.” He highlighted the army’s role in confronting the United States, Israel, and separatist groups, stressing that Iran’s armed forces remain strong, unified, and capable. He also pointed to advancements in drone and naval capabilities. The message commemorated a martyred leader who played a key role in preserving and strengthening the army in the early years after the revolution. Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei concluded by calling for further development of military capabilities and paid tribute to fallen commanders, soldiers, and their families.
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 ResistanceTrench 镜像：🇮🇷 ⚡️ 阿亚图拉穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊在伊朗建军节发表强硬讲话。伊朗最高领袖阿亚图拉穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊发表讲话，纪念伊朗伊斯兰共和国建军节，强调了军事实力、民族团结以及对敌人的持续抵抗。他指出，1979年的伊斯兰革命将军队从一支依附于巴列维政权的武装力量转变为以人民为基础的机构，称其为“民族之子”。他强调了军队在对抗美国、以色列和分裂主义团体中的作用，并强调伊朗武装力量依然强大、团结且有能力。他还提到了无人机和海军能力的进步。此次讲话纪念了一位在革命后初期为维护和加强军队发挥关键作用的烈士领导人。阿亚图拉穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊最后呼吁进一步发展军事能力，并向阵亡的指挥官、士兵及其家属致敬。

text: 🇷🇺 ⚔️ 🇺🇦 Lavrov on Russia-Ukraine negotiations. At the last Istanbul meeting in July, Russia proposed raising delegation levels and forming three working groups on humanitarian, military, and political issues. Ukraine had complained the talks were too narrow. Russia gave them what they asked for. Kiev waited until November, then said they weren't interested. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 ⚔️ 🇺🇦 拉夫罗夫谈俄乌谈判。在7月的最后一次伊斯坦布尔会议上，俄罗斯提议提高代表团级别，并就人道主义、军事和政治问题成立三个工作组。乌克兰曾抱怨谈判范围太窄。俄罗斯满足了他们的要求。基辅一直等到11月，然后说他们没兴趣了。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei Issues Strong Message on Iran Army Day Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei, Supreme Leader of Iran, issued a message marking the anniversary of the Islamic Republic of Iran’s Army, emphasizing military strength, national unity, and continued resistance against enemies. He stated that the 1979 Islamic Revolution transformed the army from a force tied to the Pahlavi regime into a people-based institution, describing it as “a child of the nation.” He highlighted the army’s role in confronting the United States, Israel, and separatist groups, stressing that Iran’s armed forces remain strong, unified, and capable. He also pointed to advancements in drone and naval capabilities. The message commemorated a martyred leader who played a key role in preserving and strengthening the army in the early years after the revolution. Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei concluded by calling for further development of military capabilities and paid tribute to fallen commanders, soldiers, and their families.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 阿亚图拉穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊在伊朗建军节发表强硬讲话。伊朗最高领袖阿亚图拉穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊发表讲话，纪念伊朗伊斯兰共和国建军节，强调了军事实力、民族团结以及对敌人的持续抵抗。他指出，1979年的伊斯兰革命将军队从一支依附于巴列维政权的武装力量转变为以人民为基础的机构，称其为“民族之子”。他强调了军队在对抗美国、以色列和分裂主义团体中的作用，并强调伊朗武装力量依然强大、团结且有能力。他还提到了无人机和海军能力的进步。此次讲话纪念了一位在革命后初期为维护和加强军队发挥关键作用的烈士领导人。阿亚图拉穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊最后呼吁进一步发展军事能力，并向阵亡的指挥官、士兵及其家属致敬。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇳🇮🇷🇮🇶 AP: Two Indian vessels have reversed course in the Strait of Hormuz following reports of gunfire from Iran’s Revolutionary Guard. The ships include an Indian‑flagged supertanker carrying two million barrels of Iraqi oil. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇳 TankerTrackers: A recording from a merchant tanker, the Sanmar Herald, captures the crew pleading with Iranian Sepah Navy forces after being given clearance to transit the Strait of Hormuz. “You gave me clearance to go! You are firing now! Let me turn back,” the crew member says. The vessel had reportedly been cleared to pass but came under fire. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇳🇮🇷🇮🇶 美联社：在收到伊朗革命卫队开火的报告后，两艘印度船只在霍尔木兹海峡掉头。这些船只包括一艘悬挂印度国旗、载有200万桶伊拉克石油的超级油轮。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇳 TankerTrackers：一段来自商用油轮“Sanmar Herald”号的录音记录了船员在获得通过霍尔木兹海峡的许可后，恳求伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军的情景。“你们给了我通行许可！你们现在开火了！让我掉头，”船员说。据报道，该船此前已获准通行，但随后遭到射击。 @wfwitness

text: Jordan Bardella, leader of France’s far-right party National Rally: Trump’s war objectives are erratic, and good luck to anyone trying to find any coherence in them.
text_zh: 法国极右翼政党“国民联盟”领导人若尔当·巴尔代拉：特朗普的战争目标反复无常，谁要是想从中找出逻辑连贯性，那祝他好运。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 WSJ: The U.S. military is tracking Iranian attacks on two non‑US vessels, a senior US official said. According to the vessels’ masters, the Iranian boats did not issue a VHF radio challenge before opening fire. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇳 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 AP : Two Indian vessels have reversed course in the Strait of Hormuz following reports of gunfire from Iran’s Revolutionary Guard. The ships include an Indian‑flagged supertanker carrying two million barrels of Iraqi oil. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 华尔街日报：一位美国高级官员表示，美军正在追踪伊朗对两艘非美国船只的袭击。据船长称，伊朗船只在开火前并未发出甚高频（VHF）无线电警告。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇳 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 美联社：在收到伊朗革命卫队开火的报告后，两艘印度船只在霍尔木兹海峡掉头。这些船只包括一艘悬挂印度国旗、载有200万桶伊拉克石油的超级油轮。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian state broadcaster reminded those urging Tehran to follow international law that on 29 February 2026 – right in the middle of talks – the United States assassinated Iran’s top political and religious leader, along with several senior military officials. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗国家广播公司提醒那些敦促德黑兰遵守国际法的人，在2026年2月29日——谈判正进行时——美国暗杀了伊朗最高政治和宗教领袖，以及几名高级军事官员。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. CENTCOM: Since the blockade began, 23 ships have complied with U.S. orders to turn around. AH‑64 Apache helicopters are flying above the Strait of Hormuz, providing a visible presence in support of freedom of navigation. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国中央司令部：自封锁开始以来，已有23艘船只听从美国命令掉头离开。AH-64阿帕奇直升机正在霍尔木兹海峡上空飞行，提供可见的存在感以支持航行自由。 @wfwitness

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ‼️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 Ukraine’s Security Service (SBU) conducted an operation in Crimea: ▪️ Three Russian vessels, a radar station, and logistical facilities were damaged. ▪️ The strike reportedly targeted the large landing ships Yamal and Azov, as well as another vessel (type unspecified). A Grachonok-class patrol boat was also likely damaged. ▪️ Drones hit the antennas of the Delfin system, the Mys-M1 radar station, and fuel storage tanks at an oil depot. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231：‼️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 乌克兰国家安全局（SBU）在克里米亚开展了一次行动：▪️ 三艘俄罗斯船只、一个雷达站和后勤设施受损。▪️ 据报道，袭击目标是大型登陆舰“亚马尔”号和“亚速”号，以及另一艘船只（型号未详）。一艘“Grachonok”级巡逻艇也可能受损。▪️ 无人机击中了“Delfin”系统的天线、“Mys-M1”雷达站以及一个油库的储油罐。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: U.S. Central Command AH-64 Apaches fly above the Strait of Hormuz during a patrol, April 17. U.S. Army Soldiers are flying in and around the strait providing a visible presence in support of freedom of navigation. https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2045468301799645569/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部AH-64阿帕奇直升机于4月17日在巡逻期间飞越霍尔木兹海峡。美国陆军士兵正在海峡及其周边飞行，提供可见的存在感以支持航行自由。https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2045468301799645569/photo/1 推文
